message:
✨ Check vCluster CRDs on clusters, show install status in dropdown (#2935)

Backend:
- New CheckVClusterOnCluster() checks for vCluster CRDs via kubectl
- Lists vCluster instances and version from CRD + Helm release
- CheckVClusterOnAllClusters() scans all kubeconfig contexts
- New /vcluster/check endpoint (GET with optional ?context=)

Frontend:
- Remove vcluster from Detected Tools grid and local cluster dropdown
- Force user to select a host cluster (no "Current context" default)
- Host cluster dropdown shows ✅ with version + instance count for
  clusters that have vCluster CRDs installed
- "Deploy vCluster" button replaced with "vCluster ready" when
  CRD is detected on the selected cluster
- Create button disabled until host cluster is selected

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
